auth.create_subtitle: Answer 4 questions wey only you sabi. We no go save any of your answers.
auth.question_mothers_name: Wetin be your mama first name?
auth.question_year: One year wey you go remember forever
auth.question_secret: One secret word wey only you sabi
auth.seed_subtitle: Write dem down or download PDF. If you forget your answers, use these words to enter your account again.
auth.error_invalid_mnemonic: Those words no correct. Check am again.

editor.openseal_hint: Dis go put permanent proof of your story on Bitcoin. Nobody fit change am.

feed.empty: Story never dey here. You fit be the first to post.
